articles.title: Oil Drops as Trump’s Hormuz Agreement Lifts Outlook for Supply
articles.summary: Oil fell as an interim US-Iran peace deal went into effect, putting the focus on how quickly transits through the Strait of Hormuz can be ramped up as Persian Gulf producers restart shut-in fields.

articles.title: S&P Futures Climb as US-Iran Deal Takes Effect: Markets Wrap
